team.detail: No human team assigned; AI-only at $80 is appropriate for an AI-first model where this workflow is pure data processing (trial balance ingestion, materiality recalculation, entity contribution analysis, matrix building). Partner/manager review of these outputs occurs downstream in predecessor_calibration (weeks 4-6) and partner_scoping_lock (weeks 6-7), so human oversight is preserved in the overall stream.

allocation.detail: No human allocations to evaluate. AI cost of $80 for ~30 minutes of reasoning-tier model work processing trial balance, 100+ entity structures, board minutes, and segment data is plausible.

description.detail: Apple-specific claims are accurate: Apple uses SAP for ERP, reports Products vs. Services as operating segments, and has 5 geographic reporting segments (Americas, Europe, Greater China, Japan, Rest of Asia Pacific). 100+ entities is plausible for a company of Apple's scale. No PCAOB AS paragraph numbers are cited, so none to verify. The described scope (materiality recalculation, significant account matrix, component scoping, risk-to-assertion mapping) matches the workflow's inputs, outputs, and requirement_ids.

requirements.detail: The four listed requirement_ids are appropriate, but audit_strategy (AS 2101) is missing. The workflow explicitly determines component scope type per entity (full/specified/analytical/none) based on contribution thresholds and produces the definitive ScopingOutput — this is core audit strategy work. risk_to_procedure_linkage is borderline since this workflow maps risks to assertions rather than to procedures, but it is a necessary precursor step and acceptable to retain.

timing.detail: Weeks 2-4 (2-week window) is appropriate. The ~30 min AI runtime fits easily within this window; the broader window accounts for client data availability (trial balance, entity list, board minutes). Sequencing is sound: public_data_scoping (weeks 0-0.5) completes well before, providing PreliminaryScopingOutput. ScopingOutput feeds predecessor_calibration (weeks 4-6) and partner_scoping_lock (weeks 6-7) with no gaps or overlaps. Timing aligns with early planning phase relative to Apple's late-September FY-end.

corrections.reason: The workflow determines component scope type per entity (full/specified/analytical/none) based on contribution thresholds and produces the definitive ScopingOutput replacing Phase 1 preliminary. This is core audit strategy work under AS 2101 (Audit Planning) and should be mapped accordingly.
